use_cases: Content discovery and filtering in media or e-commerce platforms
Tab-based navigation between different content categories like Popular and Favorites
Search expansion interface for dashboards or app navigation bars
Product or resource filtering controls in SaaS applications
Navigation menus with expandable search functionality
ai_summary: A discover button component combining tabbed navigation with an expandable search input. Features animated search expansion using Framer Motion's spring physics, dual-state tabs for Popular/Favorites filtering, and integrates Hugeicons for visual indicators. Designed as a reusable navigation element for content-heavy applications requiring search and category filtering.
